violations.text: Allergen advisory statement is not present on menu or at order point. Allergen advisory statement is required to inform consumers of their obligation to inform staff of any food allergies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

Establishment does not have an individual with the Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license. Establishment has several employees with current food safety certificate. Application provided to PIC during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the exterior walk-in freezer area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. -Establishment shall register a ServSafe certified with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager (RI license). -Application provided to establishment at the time of this inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (fries) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. -Staff voluntarily disposed of the fries during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The ceiling in the main cooking area and ceiling in the back oven area observed with chipped/peeled paint/coating. Ceiling shall be smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024
